intended_use.summary: Detect wheel components (rims, bolts, full wheels) for automotive visual inspection.
out_of_scope: internal hub components such as bearings or brake discs
motorcycle, bicycle or heavy vehicle wheels
damage or deformation detection on parts

data.labeling_notes: Only fully visible objects annotated; bolts not completely visible were discarded. When mounted, both `roda` and `jante` are boxed independently, with the rim contained within the wheel. `roda` boxes extend to the outer limit of the visible tire; `jante` boxes extend to the outer limit of the rim, excluding the tire. Low contrast bolts annotated only if clearly identifiable.

limitations: Undetected bolts due to low contrast against dark rims or under dark shadows.
Failures on inclined capture angles far from the frontal perspective, which distort rim geometry and reduce the visible bolt area.
Trained on daylight/indoor images; night conditions are untested.

license.notes: No personally identifiable information in dataset. No proprietary logos intentionally captured.
